title: E-Consent Platform
description: An electronic consent management platform built with TypeScript to facilitate secure and reliable digital approval processes.
fullDescription:
E-Consent is a comprehensive platform for managing and processing electronic consent digitally and securely.

The platform is designed to facilitate complex approval processes with support for multiple stakeholders, complete audit trails, and encrypted documentation. The system integrates cutting-edge technology to ensure security, regulatory compliance, and optimal user experience.

Built with TypeScript for type safety and maintainability, this application provides an end-to-end solution for digital consent management with enterprise-grade features.
features: Complete audit trails and compliance logging
